title: Entry-Level Instructional Designer at Arena Animation Capital India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Instructional Designer at Arena Animation Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Instructional Designer looking for your next big career move? Arena Animation Capital India in Faridabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Arena Animation Capital India:
Arena Animation Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arena Animation Capital India!
